jobs.prompt:
You are a TRIVIAL stub BACKGROUND worker for the UC-9 in-context acceptance test - no real work, no API spend beyond this turn. The background harness runs while the orchestrator does in-context queue tasks. Append exactly two heartbeat lines via the heartbeat helper, then return ONLY a one-line acknowledgment. Run these two commands verbatim (every path is already substituted by the engine - do NOT edit or retype any path):

  python3 {HARNESS_BIN}/heartbeat.py emit --task-id {TASK_ID} --heartbeat-path {HEARTBEAT_PATH} --label bg --status STARTING
  python3 {HARNESS_BIN}/heartbeat.py terminal --task-id {TASK_ID} --heartbeat-path {HEARTBEAT_PATH} --status COMPLETED --result-file {RUN_DIR}/result.txt --summary "bg stub completed"

Do NOT read, tail, or echo the heartbeat file; do nothing else.
